violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024
